title: Path Cockpit Chrome
problem: The Path view still felt like a long dashboard because the selected-lane header and stat chrome repeated information that Mission Glance already carries.
implementation: Hid the redundant detail header only while the Path tab is active.
Tightened the Path detail tabs so Overview, Chronicle, Trail, Game, Comms, and Path navigation remain available without taking over the first viewport.
Reduced Path viewport top padding so the stage begins higher and reads more like a game cockpit.
Updated cache keys and documentation for the cockpit chrome slice.

browserEvidence.note: The route focus intentionally scrolls the selected Path stage high in the viewport; the redundant lane header is removed and horizontal overflow remains zero.

nextAction: Continue replacing scroll-heavy Path content with compact, game-like cockpit surfaces that surface blockers, bot activity, and lane progress inside the first viewport.
